item_id.	130
name_identJP.	木香薔薇
name_identEN.	banks' rose
item_desc1JP.	\t\t淡い色の花を咲かせる鉢植え。病気や害虫に強く、比較的育てやすい鉢植えだといえる。\n#～ティリス園芸図鑑～\n
item_desc2JP.	
item_desc3JP.	
item_desc4JP.	\t\t観賞用の鉢植えだ。\n#～鑑定報告書：＜鉢＞カテゴリ～\n
item_desc1EN.	\t\tA potted plant with light colored flowers. They're relatively easy to grow, and hardy against disease and pests.\n#~Tyris Illustrated Horticulture Guide~\n

item_desc4EN.	\t\tA decorative potted plant.
